Ibn Haldun University Complex

The first phase of Ibn Haldun University Complex, built on the model of classical Turkish architecture, was opened on October 19, 2020. With the complex, IHU has gained the identity of a "campus university" with its modern faculty buildings and classrooms equipped with the latest technological facilities, congress and conference halls, comfortable dormitories, library, green areas and social facilities.

Ibn Haldun University Complex is planned to open Ibn Haldun Grove, congress building, mosque, student social center, additional dormitories and faculty buildings in the following stages.
